title: armeria maritima subsp. ciliata
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. ciliata, also known as sea thrift or ciliate thrift, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Armeria maritima subsp. ciliata have been found to provide several health benefits, including wound healing, anti-oxidative, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as skin infections and respiratory issues. Armeria maritima subsp. ciliata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
